mapper.select:
SELECT c.id, c.title, c.status, c.description, c.cover_image, c.price, c.level, c.student_count, c.create_time, cat.name AS category_name, u.username AS teacher_name,
(SELECT ROUND(IFNULL(AVG(rating), 0), 1) FROM course_comments WHERE course_id = c.id) AS rating,
CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_courses uc WHERE uc.course_id = c.id AND uc.user_id = #{userId} AND uc.status = 'active' ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_joined,
CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM course_favorites cf WHERE cf.course_id = c.id AND cf.user_id = #{userId} ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_favorited FROM courses c LEFT JOIN course_categories cat ON c.category_id = cat.id LEFT JOIN users u ON c.teacher_id = u.id
c.status = 'PUBLISHED'
AND c.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
AND c.category_id = #{categoryId}
AND c.level = #{level}
ORDER BY c.create_time DESC

SELECT c.id, c.title, c.status, c.description, c.cover_image, c.price, c.level, c.student_count, c.create_time, cat.name AS category_name, u.username AS teacher_name,
(SELECT ROUND(IFNULL(AVG(rating), 0), 1) FROM course_comments WHERE course_id = c.id) AS rating, 1 AS is_joined, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM course_favorites cf WHERE cf.course_id = c.id AND cf.user_id = #{userId} ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_favorited FROM user_courses uc INNER JOIN courses c ON uc.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN course_categories cat ON c.category_id = cat.id LEFT JOIN users u ON c.teacher_id = u.id WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} AND uc.status = 'active' ORDER BY uc.join_time DESC

SELECT c.id, c.title, c.status, c.description, c.cover_image, c.price, c.level, c.student_count, c.create_time, cat.name AS category_name, u.username AS teacher_name,
(SELECT ROUND(IFNULL(AVG(rating), 0), 1) FROM course_comments WHERE course_id = c.id) AS rating, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_courses uc WHERE uc.course_id = c.id AND uc.user_id = #{userId} AND uc.status = 'active' ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_joined, 1 AS is_favorited FROM course_favorites cf INNER JOIN courses c ON cf.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN course_categories cat ON c.category_id = cat.id LEFT JOIN users u ON c.teacher_id = u.id WHERE cf.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY cf.create_time DESC

SELECT c.id, c.title, c.description, c.cover_image, c.price, c.category_id, c.level, c.duration, c.teacher_id, c.student_count, c.status, c.create_time, c.update_time, cat.name AS category_name, u.username AS teacher_name, ch.id AS chapter_id, ch.title AS chapter_title, ch.sort AS chapter_sort, ch.create_time AS chapter_create_time, s.id AS section_id, s.title AS section_title, s.video_url AS section_video_url, s.duration AS section_duration, s.is_free AS section_is_free, s.sort AS section_sort, s.create_time AS section_create_time FROM courses c LEFT JOIN course_categories cat ON c.category_id = cat.id LEFT JOIN users u ON c.teacher_id = u.id LEFT JOIN chapters ch ON c.id = ch.course_id LEFT JOIN sections s ON ch.id = s.chapter_id WHERE c.id = #{courseId} ORDER BY ch.sort, s.sort

SELECT cc.id, cc.course_id, cc.user_id, cc.content, cc.rating, cc.create_time, u.username, u.avatar FROM course_comments cc LEFT JOIN users u ON cc.user_id = u.id WHERE cc.course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY cc.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_courses (user_id, course_id, join_time, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{courseId}, NOW(), 'active') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE status = 'active', join_time = NOW()
INSERT INTO course_favorites (user_id, course_id, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{courseId}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE create_time = NOW()
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM course_favorites WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND course_id = #{courseId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course_comments (course_id, user_id, content, rating, create_time) VALUES (#{courseId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{rating}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_courses WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND course_id = #{courseId} AND status = 'active'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM course_favorites WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND course_id = #{courseId}

SELECT c.id, c.title, c.cover_image, c.price, c.level, c.student_count, cat.name AS category_name, u.username AS teacher_name,
(SELECT ROUND(IFNULL(AVG(rating), 0), 1) FROM course_comments WHERE course_id = c.id) AS rating,
CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM course_favorites cf WHERE cf.course_id = c.id AND cf.user_id = #{userId} ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_favorited,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sections s INNER JOIN chapters ch ON s.chapter_id = ch.id WHERE ch.course_id = c.id) AS total_sections,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM learning_progress lp INNER JOIN sections s ON lp.section_id = s.id INNER JOIN chapters ch ON s.chapter_id = ch.id WHERE ch.course_id = c.id AND lp.user_id = #{userId} AND lp.finished = 1) AS finished_sections FROM user_courses uc INNER JOIN courses c ON uc.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN course_categories cat ON c.category_id = cat.id LEFT JOIN users u ON c.teacher_id = u.id WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} AND uc.status = 'active' ORDER BY uc.join_time DESC
